basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Recruitment 2026: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board has released the official notification for 10 Laboratory Technician Class-3 posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 36 years Age Relaxation: PwD General Male +10 years (max 43 years), General Female PwD +15 years (max 45), Reserved Male PwD +15 years (max 45), Reserved Female PwD +20 years (max 45)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry / Microbiology / Biochemistry, Diploma in Laboratory Technician or Medical Laboratory Technician course or Post-graduate diploma in medical laboratory technology or one year Medical Laboratory Technician training course, Basic knowledge of computer application as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment Rules 1967, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry/Microbiology/Biochemistry Diploma in Laboratory Technician/Medical Laboratory Technician/Post-graduate diploma in medical laboratory technology/one year Medical Laboratory Technician training course Basic knowledge of computer application Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both

salary_details.details: Fixed pay Rs. 40800 per month for first 5 years + allowances, then regular Pay Matrix Level-5 Rs. 29200-92300

selection_process: Competitive Written Examination (Objective MCQ - Computer Based Response Test or OMR) Merit List Preparation (category-wise as per disability groups) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 recruitment is May 24, 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 36 years for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry/Microbiology/Biochemistry along with a Diploma in Laboratory Technician or equivalent. Basic computer knowledge and proficiency in Gujarati or Hindi are also required.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Laboratory Technician Class-3 post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Laboratory Technician Class-3 position by the Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 400/-. Please ensure the fee is paid within the stipulated dates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Competitive Written Examination, followed by Merit List Preparation and Document Verification. The written exam will be objective MCQ based.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Laboratory Technician Class-3 post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 40800 per month for the first 5 years as fixed pay, with allowances. After that, it will be as per Pay Matrix Level-5, ranging from Rs. 29200 to Rs. 92300 per month.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official GSSSB website or the direct link provided. Ensure all details are filled correctly and documents are uploaded as per the guidelines.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for PwD candidates. Specific relaxations are mentioned for General Male PwD, General Female PwD, Reserved Male PwD, and Reserved Female PwD.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the GSSSB website or accessed via the link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
